WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand';

step.sql:
SELECT localid, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON(ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326))::json),4326),25833)
                               FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
                               WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand')) ;

SELECT localid, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON(ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326))::json),4326),25833)
                               FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
                               WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand')) ;

SELECT localid, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON(ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326))::json),4326),25833)
                               FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
                               WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand')) ;

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer AS kommunenr, kommunenavn AS navn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, kommunenummer, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
LIMIT 5;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --
